title: Every speed in this video, on one dial (km/h)

source.name: The video's own ladder: IAAF / ICAO / NASA / COBE-WMAP CMB dipole

notes: Recap ladder of the figures used across the video, each sourced at its own beat: Bolt 45; jet cruise 900; equatorial spin 1,670; ISS 28,000; Earth orbit 107,000; Parker Solar Probe 692,000; galactic orbit 828,000; CMB-frame speed 1,330,000 (COBE/WMAP dipole).
